channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Germany claims it has the world’s best bread
item.description: May 5th is national Bread Day, and Germans are ready to roll

item.title: Checks and Balance: What a murder trial reveals about justice in the Trump era
item.description: Charlotte Howard, our New York bureau chief, on America’s legal system

item.title: North Korea Puts Its Medium-Term Plan on Track
Japan’s Forgotten Deployment to the Middle East
item.description: Tokyo should take two-step approach to support safe passage in the Strait of Hormuz, starting by leveraging its existing force in the region.
